Name: Quantum Wisdom Lab
Content Ideas: Convert deep dives into Vedic-Quantum concepts from longer videos into engaging, bite-sized YouTube Shorts. Focus on a single, intriguing question or paradox per short. Example: 'Quantum Entanglement & Universal Consciousness: A Vedic Perspective' (1-minute summary with strong visuals).

Name: Ancient Physics Daily

Example: 'Unlocking the Secrets of the Akasha: Beyond the Quantum Field. #VedicPhysics #CosmicConsciousness' (Short, thought-provoking text with a striking image).

Name: Modern Yogi Tech
